query:
SELECT 
  groupCode,
  COUNT(*) as memberCount,
  GROUP_CONCAT(CONCAT(fullName, ' (', team, ')') ORDER BY fullName SEPARATOR ' | ') as members,
  GROUP_CONCAT(DISTINCT team) as teamAssigned
FROM sports_day_registrations
WHERE groupCode IS NOT NULL AND groupCode != '' AND groupCode IN ('SD002-5MQVK', 'SD002-L53S8', 'SD002-M9PLA', 'SD002-UDX')
GROUP BY groupCode
ORDER BY groupCode;
